message:
Refine proptest suite: improved strategies, formatting, and assertion patterns

Comprehensive proptest improvements across 33 test files in frankenterm-core:

Strategy refinements:
- proptest_beads_bridge: tightened arbitrary impls and assertion scope
- proptest_identity_graph: improved graph generation strategies
- proptest_namespace_isolation: better namespace boundary testing
- proptest_lexical_backend_bridge: refined backend interaction patterns
- proptest_workflow_types: restructured workflow variant generation

Formatting and structural cleanup (rustfmt compliance):
- proptest_policy_compliance: multi-line assertion formatting
- proptest_policy_audit_chain: chain validation test formatting
- proptest_policy_quarantine: quarantine state machine assertions
- proptest_output_renderers: renderer output verification formatting
- proptest_config: configuration boundary test formatting
- proptest_plan: plan execution path formatting
- proptest_robot_types: type serialization test formatting
- proptest_storage: storage operation test formatting

Minor test logic adjustments:
- proptest_ars_secret_scan: secret detection pattern updates
- proptest_ars_symbolic_exec: symbolic execution path refinements
- proptest_forensic_export: export format verification updates
- proptest_connector_sdk: SDK interface test adjustments
- proptest_coordination: coordination protocol test updates
- proptest_ingest: ingestion pipeline test tweaks
- proptest_scan_pipeline: pipeline stage test updates
- proptest_schema_gate: schema validation test updates
- proptest_resize_scheduler: scheduler timing test updates
- proptest_session_topology: topology test adjustments
- proptest_simulation: simulation harness updates
- proptest_search_migration_controller: migration test fix
- proptest_tantivy_reindex: reindex test updates
- proptest_tui_state: TUI state machine test tweak
- proptest_policy_decision_log: decision logging test format
- proptest_workflows_*: 5 workflow test files refined

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
